curation_notes: Patch commit b53a906 modifies only one source file (core/http/src/uri/formatter.rs), changing the with_prefix function. The vulnerability is a use-after-free caused by an unsafe transmute of &str to &'static str that is pushed onto a StackVec prefix stack. If the user-provided callback (f) panics, the prefix is never popped, leaving a dangling static reference. The fix introduces a PrefixGuard struct with a Drop implementation that unconditionally pops the prefix, ensuring panic safety. Pre-assigned class use-after-free (CWE-416) is correct. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern.
